mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, group_idx, group_name, print_seq, use_yn, add_date, add_id, mod_date, mod_id, req_limit_yn, req_limit_type, req_limit_count, large_category_idx FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_GROUP WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND large_category_idx = #{large_category_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY group_idx DESC

SELECT homepage_id, group_idx, group_name, print_seq, use_yn, add_date, add_id, mod_date, mod_id, req_limit_yn, req_limit_type, req_limit_count, large_category_idx FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_GROUP WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND large_category_idx = #{large_category_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY group_idx DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_GROUP WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND large_category_idx = #{large_category_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'

SELECT homepage_id, group_idx, group_name, print_seq, use_yn, add_date, add_id, mod_date, mod_id, req_limit_yn, req_limit_type, req_limit_count, large_category_idx FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_GROUP WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND large_category_idx = #{large_category_idx} AND group_idx = #{group_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINING_CATEGORY_GROUP SET group_name = #{group_name}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE, req_limit_yn = #{req_limit_yn}, req_limit_type = #{req_limit_type}, req_limit_count = #{req_limit_count} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND large_category_idx = #{large_category_idx} AND group_idx = #{group_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(print_seq),0)+1 FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_GROUP WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND group_idx = #{group_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
